summary: Recording details are unclear but the performance is exceptional – high‑energy versions of Stranger, U.S. Blues and a killer Deal make this show stand out.
review: Fans rave about an electrifying set despite an average‑looking setlist, highlighting the opening jam on “Stranger,” the soaring “U.S. Blues,” and a blistering finish on “Deal.” No reviewer commented on the audio source or fidelity, so the technical quality remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews give five stars and focus on outstanding musical moments; recording quality is not discussed, but the consensus on the show’s greatness drives a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention soundboard vs. audience or any audio clarity issues, leaving recording characteristics uncertain.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Even though the setlist seemed ordinary on paper, the band’s energy turned it into a high‑octane performance from start to finish.
